description:
Offered: every semester
This course is designed specifically for nursing and exercise sports majors and will include a study of selected topics from general chemistry, organic chemistry and biochemistry. (This course will not fulfill the requirements of the biology major or healthy professional programs such as medicine, dentistry, veterinary science, pharmacy, physical therapy, occupational therapy and physician assistant). Lecture and lab.
Prerequisite(s): Passing score on Quantitative and Analytical Skills Accuplacer placement exam OR successful completion of MATH 0300 [Quantitative Prep.]
Meets General Education Requirement(s): SI
prerequisites: Passing score on Quantitative and Analytical Skills Accuplacer placement exam OR successful completion of MATH 0300 [Quantitative Prep.]
